steps.title: Compare both definitions
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two states' definitions of a lake. Minnesota requires an inland body of water to be at least 10 acres, while Wisconsin does not use size in its definition.

steps.title: State the restriction difference
steps.content: The strongest sentence presents both definitions and directly explains that Minnesota's is more restrictive. A and C discuss only one definition, and B says they differ without explaining how. The answer is D.
